journey.name: 09-import
journey.description: 账单导入。若无可用虚构样例账单文件，标记 SKIP 而非 FAIL。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the record-import (导入) entry if present
If no fabricated sample bill file is available on the device, mark this journey SKIPPED and stop
Otherwise, import the fabricated sample bill file and verify imported records appear without crashing
